title: AS

Mathématiques Générales pour les PEIP 2ème année (21h)

Workshops for second year student of Polytech Montpellier
Sequence convergence, Series convergence



Statistical Test, Bioinformatics Master 2 Student (21h)

Workshops for master 2 student of the Bioinformatics master in Montpellier
Hypothesis testing, Student’s Test, \(\chi^2\) test, test for normality

title: Abel SILLY
text: I’m currently a PhD student at Institut Montpellierain Alexander Grothendieck working on “Statistical modelling of RNA degradation mechanisms in plants” under the supervision of Alice Cleynen and Sophie Lebre. My main research interests are about developping statistical methods regarding omics data. I strongly value bioinformatics and am also interested in machine learning in general.
